# Encountered Issues — Recurring Bug Pattern Catalog

> **Auto-generated. Do not hand-edit.** To add a pattern, label the
> originating issue `recurring-pattern` and run `rite --refresh-encountered-issues`.

This catalog lists bug classes that recurred 2+ times during Sharkrite
dogfooding. Its purpose: let future Claude sessions recognize a familiar
pattern quickly and apply the known fix rather than re-diagnosing from scratch.

Each entry includes: the pattern name, recurrence instances (PRs + dates),
root-cause class, and the mitigation or lint rule that prevents recurrence.
